CustomField.formula: Actual_Income_in_January__c + Actual_Income_in_February__c + Actual_Income_in_March__c + Actual_Income_in_April__c + Actual_Income_in_May__c + Actual_Income_in_June__c + Actual_Income_in_July__c + Actual_Income_in_August__c + Actual_Income_in_September__c + Actual_Income_in_October__c + Actual_Income_in_November__c + Actual_Income_in_December__c
CustomField.label: Total Actual Sales Income
